output.one_sentence_summary: This title updates SNAP benefits, farm payment rules, forestry funding, crop insurance, and rural development programs.
bullets: Updates SNAP work requirements and eligibility rules for able-bodied adults and utility allowances.
Changes farm payment systems including price loss coverage, risk management, and payment limits for large producers.
Rescinds funding for forestry programs and updates sugar/dairy policy.
Adjusts crop insurance rules for beginning farmers, area-based coverage, and premium support.
Creates new rural development programs for conservation, research, and horticulture.
